further_reading.title: A practical guide to building agents
further_reading.why_relevant: Gives practical guidance on when agentic workflows are appropriate, how to structure them, and how to add guardrails and evaluation.

further_reading.title: NIST AI RMF Playbook
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides concrete risk-management and verification practices that map well to workflow checkpoints, review gates, and human oversight.

further_reading.title: Advancing accountability in AI
further_reading.why_relevant: Explains why AI systems need explicit accountability, traceability, and lifecycle controls, which aligns with the module's emphasis on ownership and verification.

notes: No inline citation claims identified. The module is primarily pedagogical workflow guidance and illustrative process design, with no named incidents, statistics, standards references in-body, vendor/version capability claims, or other hard factual assertions that require inline sourcing under the provided rules.
